events.note: Feature scaffolded by system sweep audit 2026-05-16. Container created ahead of 2026-05-21 v7.9 promotion-decision date so the decision has a discoverable tracking home. Calibration window (2026-05-15 → 05-21) is the research phase — operator-driven review of Mechanism A gate-coverage.jsonl + cycle-time findings vs promotion criteria.

events.summary: T7.9.0 v7.9 pre-promotion-decision review started: 1850-entry snapshot covering 2026-05-04 to 2026-05-13, 9.0-day soak window, 6 spot-check actions initiated
Action 1 started: FIT-80 Mode C all-fires review - 10 real fires across 48 entries
Action 2 started: FIT-83 CACHE_HITS drift spot-check - 5 real fires across 7 entries

Action 1 completed: FIT-80 Mode C all-fires review. 10 real fires; all mode=staged, candidates=1, checked=1, consistent emission. Fires cluster on 2026-05-07 (4 fires) and 2026-05-10 (6 fires) matching active development sessions. BRANCH_ISOLATION_HISTORICAL advisories in integrity snapshots corroborate (3d-interactive-framework-flow-diagram, cross-repo-state-sync-impl, hadf-phase2bis-replication confirmed committed on non-feature branches). Cannot git-log pre-clone history; best-effort evidence strongly supports true positives. Verdict: CONDITIONAL

Action 2 completed: FIT-83 CACHE_HITS drift spot-check. 5 real fires; 3 staged single-candidate fires at 2026-05-11T17:08-17:13 + 1 staged multi-candidate fire 2026-05-12T07:58 + 1 all-mode fire 2026-05-12T14:22. Features verified: cross-repo-state-sync-impl, code-connect-automation, framework-v7-8-bridge all have cache_hits=None confirmed. Session-ledger sub-check skipped (gitignored, not in snapshot). 5/5 cache_hits-empty valid. Verdict: PROMOTE
Action 3 started: FIT-79 Mode B spot-check. 21 total real fires (16 pre-fix, 5 post-fix). Sampling 3 from pre-fix for branch/infra-path verification.
Action 4 started: FIT-81 FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS scope check. 25 entries with not_complete_transition skip_reason across 20 pure-skip and 5 mixed-fire entries.
Action 5 started: Tier 1.1 backfill decision. Latest measurement-adoption snapshot (2026-05-18): 39/73 zero-adopted, 10 post-Mechanism-C features with empty cache_hits.
Action 6 started: Mode B post-fix soak-validity. PR #317 fix at 2026-05-12T16:30Z. 5 post-fix fires in 2026-05-13T05:48-06:08 window from chore/seed branch.

Action 3 completed: FIT-79 Mode B spot-check. 21 total fires (16 pre-fix, 5 post-fix). Sampled: 2026-05-07T14:59Z (framework-v7-8-branch-isolation infra impl - .githooks/*.py .claude/shared/* CLAUDE.md), 2026-05-09T19:29Z (post-isolation follow-up), 2026-05-10T05:22Z (code-connect infra commit). Fire timestamps align with known infra-touching framework dev sessions. Git log unavailable pre-clone (best-effort). 3/3 valid. Verdict: PROMOTE

Action 4 completed: FIT-81 FEATURE_CLOSURE_COMPLETENESS scope check. 25 not_complete_transition skip entries: 20 pure-skips (gate correctly scoped), 5 mixed (some features transitioning to complete in same commit, others correctly skipped). Gate logic: only checks features where current_phase transitions TO complete; skips all others. Pattern confirms correct scope. 5/5 correctly scoped. Verdict: PROMOTE

Action 5 completed: Tier 1.1 backfill decision. 10 post-Mechanism-C features with empty cache_hits (below 15 threshold). Recommend surgical backfill of 5 highest-value: framework-v7-8-bridge, code-connect-automation, cross-repo-state-sync-impl, 3d-interactive-framework-flow-diagram, hadf-phase2bis-replication. Not a v7.9 blocker. Defer remaining to FIT-95.

Action 6 completed: Mode B post-fix soak-validity. Pre-fix: 16 fires over 8 days (non-zero, gate WAS firing). Post-fix: 5 fires in 20-min window 2026-05-13T05:48-06:08Z, all mode=staged candidates=1 checked=1 skip_reasons={}. Seed context confirms chore/seed branch .claude/shared/* changes - correct Mode B trigger. Consistent emission confirmed. Raw rate NOT cited (5-burst anomaly documented). Verdict: PROMOTE with caveat

T7.9.0 verdict: GO. All 5 candidate gates ready for 2026-05-21 promotion. FIT-79 PROMOTE, FIT-80 PROMOTE, FIT-81 PROMOTE, FIT-82 PROMOTE (mechanical), FIT-83 PROMOTE. Per-gate confidence ≥90%. Action 5 backfill recommendation documented (not a blocker).
